scripts.dev: cd server && bunx wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: cd server && bunx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:local: cd server && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply save --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd server && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply save --remote --config wrangler.toml
